settings.membership_heading: Atelier Circle Membership is free, and includes:
settings.circle_benefit_one: Free UK delivery on all orders
settings.circle_benefit_two: Collect Atelier Points With Every Purchase·
settings.circle_benefit_three: A Handwritten Card with each order
settings.circle_benefit_four: Early access to new collections and offers
settings.existing_points_link_label: Already collecting points? See How Many You Have
settings.circle_consent_text: I would like to receive occasional Atelier Circle emails. I understand that I can unsubscribe at any time.and my details will be handled in accordance with Atelier Modernista's  Privacy Policy.
settings.success_text: You’re now on the Atelier Circle list. Shop using this email address and your Atelier Points will be waiting for you.
settings.member_text: Your membership is active, including complimentary UK delivery. We’re delighted to have you with us.

settings.title: Choose Your Gift
settings.description: Choose a small pleasure from a changing selection of beautiful, useful things.
settings.note: The selection changes throughout the year.

settings.title: Choose a Studio Gift
settings.description: Choose something considered for your home, desk or dressing table.
settings.note: Candles, small design objects and seasonal Atelier finds.

settings.title: Choose Your Jewellery Gift
settings.description: Choose a piece of jewellery from a rotating edit for members of The Atelier Circle.

settings.heading: Choose Your Reward Gift
settings.introduction: Choose from jewellery, candles and considered objects selected for members of The Atelier Circle.

settings.heading: Every Purchase
settings.description: Collect Atelier Points whenever you shop with Atelier Modernista.

settings.heading: Birthday Reward
settings.description: A little something from the Atelier to mark your birthday.

settings.heading: Invite a Friend
settings.description: Introduce someone to Atelier Modernista and receive Atelier Points when they make their first purchase.

settings.heading: Share Your Thoughts
settings.description: Review a piece you have purchased and receive Atelier Points once your review has been approved.
settings.note: Review points are currently added manually.

settings.heading: Seasonal Opportunities
settings.description: From time to time, members can collect additional Atelier Points through special events and offers.

settings.heading: Collect Atelier Points
settings.introduction: Every interaction with the Atelier can bring you closer to your next Reward Gift.
